final_answer:
If “balance” does not mean proportional or equivalent, then it stops being a logical justification.

It becomes: “I was harmed, so I can choose any harm in return.” That does not follow. Without proportionality, there is no limiting rule, so “balance” can justify anything, which means it justifies nothing.

Killing or harming people is still not a valid conclusion from lost time. If you may act on this, call `911` now.
